channel.title: Super Eyepatch Wolf
channel.description:
I make videos about things I like.
My Twitter is @eyepatchwolf: https://twitter.com/EyePatchWolf
channel.itunes:author: Super Eyepatch Wolf
channel.itunes:subtitle: Super Eyepatch Wolf
channel.itunes:summary:
I make videos about things I like.
My Twitter is @eyepatchwolf: https://twitter.com/EyePatchWolf

item.title: The Unreality of Pro Wrestling: FINISH THE STORY
item.description:
The Unreality of Pro Wrestling, now with 100% more Cody Rhodes. Roman Reigns and Codys Story is my all time favorite in wrestling. Here's why.
Support the Channel: EYEPATCH WOLVES STORE: https://eyepatchwolves.com/ PATREON: https://www.patreon.com/Supereyepatchwolf
Other Eyepatch Wolf Content: Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/supereyepatchwolf (check schedule for next stream https://www.twitch.tv/supereyepatchwolf/schedule )
Regular Eyepatch Wolves/ Stream Vods: https://www.youtube.com/@regulareyepatchwolf6128
Socials: Eyepatchwolves Insta: https://www.instagram.com/eyepatchwolvesclothing/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/super_eyepatch_wolf/ Blue Sky: https://bsky.app/profile/eyepatchwolf.bsky.social
Versus Wolves Podcast: Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@VersusWolvesPodcast Podcast: https://versuswolves.libsyn.com/ Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0gmaTPRKdPS3sXA09MGMor
Jeff Jeffs Bizarre Adventure Anime Podcast: Itunes :https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/jeffjeffs-bizarre-adventure/id1610221160 (but also anywhere you can get podcasts)
Co edited by @Foxcade Producers: Vapor Witch, Sudden Mango
Sources/ Research:
CM Punk interview: https://youtu.be/1wI5ziczdoI
“Mox” by John Moxely (2022)
“There’s Just One Problem” by Brian Gewirtz (2022)
This one in particular is a really great look at Roman Reigns earlier years in WWE: https://fightbooth.com/tag/building-an-empire/
https://www.thesportster.com/news/roman-reigns-timeline-wrong-get-fans-behind-him/
https://www.theringer.com/2022/11/21/23470405/roman-reigns-wwe-head-of-the-table-profile
https://bleacherreport.com/articles/2662527-timeline-of-wwe-fans-disenchantment-with-roman-reigns
https://bleacherreport.com/articles/2623094-why-roman-reigns-is-unable-to-win-over-the-wwe-universe
https://www.theringer.com/2022/11/21/23470405/roman-reigns-wwe-head-of-the-table-profile
https://uproxx.com/prowrestling/the-best-and-worst-of-wwe-summerslam-2014/
Cross Rhodes: Goldust, Out of the Darkness
Dusty Rhodes Biography WWE Legends
item.itunes:author: Super Eyepatch Wolf
item.itunes:subtitle: The Unreality of Pro Wrestling: FINISH THE STORY
item.itunes:summary:
The Unreality of Pro Wrestling, now with 100% more Cody Rhodes. Roman Reigns and Codys Story is my all time favorite in wrestling. Here's why.
Support the Channel: EYEPATCH WOLVES STORE: https://eyepatchwolves.com/ PATREON: https://www.patreon.com/Supereyepatchwolf
Other Eyepatch Wolf Content: Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/supereyepatchwolf (check schedule for next stream https://www.twitch.tv/supereyepatchwolf/schedule )
Regular Eyepatch Wolves/ Stream Vods: https://www.youtube.com/@regulareyepatchwolf6128
Socials: Eyepatchwolves Insta: https://www.instagram.com/eyepatchwolvesclothing/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/super_eyepatch_wolf/ Blue Sky: https://bsky.app/profile/eyepatchwolf.bsky.social
Versus Wolves Podcast: Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@VersusWolvesPodcast Podcast: https://versuswolves.libsyn.com/ Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0gmaTPRKdPS3sXA09MGMor
Jeff Jeffs Bizarre Adventure Anime Podcast: Itunes :https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/jeffjeffs-bizarre-adventure/id1610221160 (but also anywhere you can get podcasts)
Co edited by @Foxcade Producers: Vapor Witch, Sudden Mango
Sources/ Research:
CM Punk interview: https://youtu.be/1wI5ziczdoI
“Mox” by John Moxely (2022)
“There’s Just One Problem” by Brian Gewirtz (2022)
This one in particular is a really great look at Roman Reigns earlier years in WWE: https://fightbooth.com/tag/building-an-empire/
https://www.thesportster.com/news/roman-reigns-timeline-wrong-get-fans-behind-him/
https://www.theringer.com/2022/11/21/23470405/roman-reigns-wwe-head-of-the-table-profile
https://bleacherreport.com/articles/2662527-timeline-of-wwe-fans-disenchantment-with-roman-reigns
https://bleacherreport.com/articles/2623094-why-roman-reigns-is-unable-to-win-over-the-wwe-universe
https://www.theringer.com/2022/11/21/23470405/roman-reigns-wwe-head-of-the-table-profile
https://uproxx.com/prowrestling/the-best-and-worst-of-wwe-summerslam-2014/
Cross Rhodes: Goldust, Out of the Darkness
Dusty Rhodes Biography WWE Legends
